purpose.description: Provides bounded X/Twitter research and drafting support for a Hermes Agent workspace. Read operations retrieve public social context, while write-capable actions require explicit human approval before execution.

risk_profile.notes: Social publishing can affect public reputation and platform compliance. The example keeps write operations approval-gated and separates read-only discovery from irreversible actions.

stopping_authority.mechanism: Disable the plugin in the Hermes Agent workspace or revoke the configured API key.

audit_surface.notes: Tool calls can log requested operation names and approval decisions. External platform ranking, rate limiting, and content availability may not be fully reconstructable.
